immigration__right_to_reside.confirmation_of_entitlement_to_reside_li: I confirm that I am a British citizen, born in the United Kingdom, and have the right to reside in this country without any restriction.
I am able to provide my valid UK passport and my original UK birth certificate as documentary evidence of my immigration status, if required.
I understand that these documents may be copied and retained in accordance with immigration legislation and data protection requirements.
